docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $662.46 FILED BY DUNN ALAN W. AS TO DEFENDANT LEXINGTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEXINGTON
IF PYMT IS MADE W/IN 90 DAYS IN CASH OR CASHIER'S CK, PLTF WILL WITHDRAW COMPLT TO BETTER BUS.BUREAU JUDGMT STAYED 90 DAYS PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES.
IF PAYMENT NOT MADE JUDGMENT MAY BE ENTERED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNN ALAN W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEXINGTON $662.46 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $701.46, IF PAYMENT IS MADE WITHIN 90 DAYS BY CASH, CASHIER CHECK, PLFT WILL WITHDRAW COMPLAINT TO BETTER BUS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COPY OF DECISION (STAY OF JUDGMENT)SENT TO MR.DUNN

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $18.03 AS TO DEFENDANT LEXINGTON
